raw_consumer_statement:
This is in regards to my complaint # XXXX against Barclays. The complaint was closed without a resolution. 
Barclays never credited my account the {$66.00},- which were refunded from their partner XXXX and states that they are unable to find XXXX XXXX. 
XXXX provided documentation that they actually refunded the {$66.00}, - The document is showing the XXXX.
